name: Spaghetti with Crabs (Weir)
recipeIngredient: Large pinch of crushed red pepper flakes
2 cups tomato sauce, preferably excellent quality homemade sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a large soup pot over medium heat.
2. Add the chopped Italian parsley, crushed red pepper flakes, live crabs, and tomato sauce to the pot. Simmer until the crabs are cooked through and the tomato sauce has thickened for about 20 minutes.
3. Remove the crabs from the pot and crack them coarsely. Return the cracked crabs to the pot.
4. Season with salt and freshly ground black pepper.
5. Bring a large pot of salted water to boil. Add the spaghetti and cook until al dente. Drain the pasta and toss it with the cooked crabs and sauce.
6. Serves 8.
[PER SERVING: 430 calories, 19 g protein, 69 g carbohydrate, 9 g fat (1 g saturated), 27 mg cholesterol, 498 mg sodium, 1 g fiber.]
